narrative:
Waynesville Village A (precinct in Warren County) has 950 registered voters, with 51.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 35.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 23.5 percentage points.
